text.title: Launch Readiness Review Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying launch readiness review end-to-end.

step.name: identify-gates
step.action: Confirm all 8 gates apply; for internal-only launches, mark non-applicable gates 'n/a-with-reason'.
step.decision-gate: If gates n/a > 3, route to solo or internal-beta methodology instead.

step.name: assign-owners
step.action: Assign one named owner per gate from the responsible function; PM escalates if function is unstaffed.
step.decision-gate: If any gate has no owner candidate, escalate to head-of-function before T-14.

step.name: evaluate-criterion
step.action: Each owner evaluates their gate against the hard criterion; emits green/yellow/red + evidence.
step.decision-gate: If criterion not testable, fix the criterion before continuing.

step.name: snapshot-t7-t3-t1
step.action: Aggregate snapshot at T-7, T-3, T-1; record open blockers + remediation deadlines.
step.decision-gate: If T-3 has any red, escalate to launch-committee; do not wait for T-1.

step.name: go-no-go-decide
step.input: Final snapshot (T-1) + open blockers + risk memo (if any)
step.action: Synthesize go / go-with-conditions / no-go; require risk-acceptance memo on any red override.
step.output: Decision with rationale + comms tree fired.
step.decision-gate: If decision is no-go, reschedule launch and reset snapshot cadence.
